# Code Block Test Document

This document tests code block detection with various languages.

## Rust Examples

```rust
fn main() {
    println!("Hello, Rust!");
}
```

```rust
struct Point {
    x: i32,
    y: i32,
}
```

## TypeScript Examples

```typescript
interface User {
    name: string;
    age: number;
}

const user: User = {
    name: "Alice",
    age: 30
};
```

## Python Examples

```python
def greet(name: str) -> str:
    return f"Hello, {name}!"

print(greet("World"))
```

## Bash Examples

```bash
#!/bin/bash
echo "Running tests..."
npm test
```

## Plain Code Block

```
This is plain text
No language specified
Should be marked as "plain"
```

## JSON Example

```json
{
    "name": "test",
    "version": "1.0.0"
}
```
